---
title: ""
---

::: columns
::: {.column width="40%" style="text-align: center;"}


## Youwei Hu

:::

::: {.column width="60%" style="text-align: left;"}

### Graduate Researcher | Biostatistics & Data Science

I am a graduate student in the Department of Biostatistics and Bioinformatics at Emory University. My research focuses on applying statistical and machine learning methods to EEG data to better understand early markers of Alzheimer's Disease and Mild Cognitive Impairment.

**Research Interests:**

- EEG signal processing & biomarker analysis
- Clinical data visualization
- Machine learning in healthcare
- Neurological disease classification

[View My Projects](projects.html) | [Download CV](files/CV.pdf) | 
[GitHub](https://github.com/hww228)

:::
:::
